footer.tagline: Delegate the work you hate. We build, host, and manage your digital assistants so you can focus on what matters.
footer.tagline_sub: Your invisible digital team. Constantly working in the background to turn your daily chaos into complete calm.

index.hero_subtitle: We build, host and manage AI-powered digital assistants that handle your most time-consuming tasks — so you can focus on what actually moves the needle.
index.step1_title: Tell us what slows you down
index.step1_body: Fill in a short brief about the task you want to automate.
index.step2_body: Our team configures and deploys a dedicated AI assistant tuned to your workflow.
index.step3_body: Your assistant works 24/7 so you don't have to.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: One assistant. One monthly fee. Cancel any time.

assistants.page_subtitle: Browse our catalogue of AI assistants. Each one is purpose-built for a specific business role.
